behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names ensure_logging_setup, prefect.logging.configuration, PROCESS_LOGGING_CONFIG, hydrated_context, and docstring requirements (logging + Dask/Ray/workers) which cover test assertions.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what needs fixing (guard function, integration with hydrated_context) without dictating exact code or line positions.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check importability, idempotency, docstring keywords, and presence of import/call strings in context.py — reasonable alternatives would still satisfy these.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute subprocess calls, invoke ensure_logging_setup(), mock setup_logging to count calls, verifying behavior, not just text.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_ensure_logging_setup_skips_when_already_configured checks setup_logging call count behavior; a stub would fail idempotency/skip tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Idempotency, docstring, import in context.py, call from hydrated_context, and skip-when-configured are all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and are separated with a pass-to-pass section comment block.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names consistent across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction mentions modules/function names but not exact lines; localization of where to add code still required.
